storyHook: 期望落空，表达失望，重新计划

narrative.when: 周日下午，原本计划好的出游泡汤了
narrative.who: 甲（满怀期待的人）· 乙（一起计划的朋友）
narrative.how: 说出原本的期待，再说现在的失落
narrative.method: 说出期望落空、谈原本的计划、表达失望、一起重新安排
narrative.event: 说好的旅行因为天气原因突然取消了

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Well, this is not what I had in mind.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: We are not going because of the rain.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I was so looking forward to the water.
turns.zh: 我本来特别期待去水边。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: We had a good idea, did we not?
turns.zh: 我们之前想得多好啊，对吧？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The little house by the water is gone.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I booked everything for this day.
turns.zh: 我为了今天把什么都订好了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Now it is all for nothing.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What a waste of a good idea.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am sad, but what can we do?
turns.zh: 我很难过，但我们能怎么办呢？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: We may get another chance.
turns.zh: 也许我们还有别的机会。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I was hoping for that view.
turns.zh: 我本来一心想着那个景色。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The weather took it all away.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I was going to take your picture there.
turns.zh: 我本来要在那儿给你拍照的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Now it is just a wet street.
turns.zh: 现在只剩湿漉漉的街道了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am sad it did not go well.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Do you have any other idea?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let us see what we can do.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I had a list of things to do.
turns.zh: 我本来列了一堆事要做。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am sad it all went wrong.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What about a day at the history house?
turns.zh: 去历史馆待一天怎么样？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is not the same at all.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I see, but it may be good.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I was so ready for the walk.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: We could go to the plant house.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I would like that, yes.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, so the plant house it is.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: But I had my heart on the water.
turns.zh: 但我心心念念的还是那片水。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I am sad about that.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The weather is not our friend today.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No, it is not. I am tired of the rain.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let us look at the plant house list?
turns.zh: 要不看看植物园的介绍？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, what do they have there?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: A warm room with trees and flowers.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That sounds soft and quiet.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It will be a good change.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I would like to see those flying things.
turns.zh: 我想看那些会飞的小东西。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: They say there is a room for them.
turns.zh: 听说有个专门的蝴蝶房。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good. And after that, a warm drink?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, the place with the cat in the book store.
turns.zh: 嗯，就是有猫的那家书店。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, I will put it on the list.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am happy we have a new way.
turns.zh: 很高兴我们有了新办法。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, it is a good one.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I was so sad about the old one.
turns.zh: 之前那个泡汤了，我特别难过。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I saw your face when you got the news.
turns.zh: 我看到你收到消息时的表情了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: All that work for nothing.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: But we will have a good time tomorrow.
turns.zh: 不过明天我们照样能玩得开心。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I hope the weather is better.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Even if it rains, we are inside.
turns.zh: 就算下雨，我们也在室内。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: True. And the cat will be there.
turns.zh: 也是。而且还有那只猫在。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That makes it better.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I keep seeing that water in my head.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Me too. But the plant place has water too.
turns.zh: 我也是。但植物园也有水啊。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Not the same. That view was special.
turns.zh: 不一样。那个景色很特别。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I see. But we will make new special views.
turns.zh: 我明白。但我们会创造新的特别景色。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You are right. What time do we go?
turns.zh: 你说得对。我们几点出发？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Ten in the morning. I have the tickets.
turns.zh: 上午十点。我已经买好票了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: And the pot work group?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is at two, after the meal.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. Let us get food at the place near the garden.
turns.zh: 好的。我们在花园附近那家店吃饭吧。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. I saw a good list for it on the net.
turns.zh: 好。我在网上看到它家菜单不错。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What do they have on the list?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Warm plates and cold plates, and a sweet list.
turns.zh: 有热菜和冷盘，还有甜品单。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I would like a warm plate, not too sharp.
turns.zh: 我想来份热菜，不要太辣。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Same for me. And a cold plate to start.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, let's get a sweet after.
turns.zh: 好，我们之后来份甜品吧。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, if we have room. I saw a sweet cake.
turns.zh: 好，如果吃得下的话。我看到有甜蛋糕。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is good. I will have the cake.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will get the fruit plate. Is that all right?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. What about the pot work?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: We make a pot and paint it. Simple and good.
turns.zh: 我们做陶罐然后上色。简单又有趣。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I thought we would be at the water now.
turns.zh: 我以为我们现在会在水边。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, the view would have been great.
turns.zh: 是啊，景色本来会很美的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I had the walk all worked out.
turns.zh: 我把徒步路线都规划好了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: And the little house by the water.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I had a surprise for you.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You did. I saw the map on the table.
turns.zh: 你确实给了。我看到桌上的地图了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Now it's all for nothing.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Not for nothing. We still have one another.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: But the rain... it will go on for days.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Then we make new designs. That is what we do.
turns.zh: 那我们就做新设计。我们一向如此。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What new designs?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I saw a place with trees inside a glass house.
turns.zh: 我看到一个地方，玻璃房子里有树。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: A glass house? Like a plant house?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, with warm air and small flying things.
turns.zh: 对，有暖气和会飞的小东西。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: But I had a desire for the water and the high land.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I see. But this is a different sort of journey.
turns.zh: 我明白。但这是另一种旅程。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Will there be ice?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Better. Warm drink with a picture on top.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Have you got a thought?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I do. I made a list on my box.
turns.zh: 有的。我在小本子上列了清单。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let me see the list.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Here. First, the plant house at ten.
turns.zh: 给。第一站，十点去植物房子。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Then a hand work group at one.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Then the book place with a cat.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The cat is a good point. I am in.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Great. And a warm drink with a picture at the end.
turns.zh: 好极了。最后喝一杯有图案的热饮。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is a good day. Not the same, but good.
turns.zh: 那会是美好的一天。不一样，但很好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. New ideas, new memories.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am happy you came over.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Me too. Let us make it a story.
turns.zh: 我也是。我们把它变成故事吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: A: I will get the map for the plant house.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. I will put it on the table.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The rain is over now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, the sun is out.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: A: Tomorrow will be a new start.
turns.zh: 明天会是一个新的开始。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. That is a good idea.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am happy we did not give up.
turns.zh: 我很高兴我们没有放弃。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: We do not give up.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: A: Let us get some rest now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. Sleep well. See you in the morning.

storyBlurb: 说好的旅行因天气泡汤，甲在客厅向乙倾诉失落。两人从失望中重拾希望，调整计划再出发。
storyScript:
【开场·期望落空】周日下午，甲家客厅的窗帘半掩着，光线黯淡。甲坐在沙发上，手机屏幕上那条取消旅行的通知还亮着。乙推门进来，看见甲垂着头，便知道事情不妙。甲抬起头，勉强笑了笑，说原本今天该在湖边看日落。窗外雨声淅沥，像是附和着这份失落。乙放下背包，坐到甲身旁，沉默片刻后轻声问，那现在怎么办。甲叹了口气，手指无意识地摩挲着手机边缘，说原本订好的民宿、预约的徒步路线，全都泡汤了。乙注意到茶几上摊开的旅行手册，上面用荧光笔标注着景点和餐厅，此刻那些鲜艳的标记显得格外刺眼。

【进行·表达失望】甲拿起那本手册，翻到折角的一页，指着上面的照片说，这是你最想去的观景台，我特意订了附近的小木屋，想给你惊喜。乙看着照片里云雾缭绕的山峰，心里一紧。甲继续说，还有那家手工冰淇淋店，你说要尝遍所有口味；山脚下的温泉，我们约好要泡到手指发皱。乙的视线模糊了，这些细节甲都记得。甲的声音越来越低，说现在全没了，连天气预报都说未来一周都有雨。乙握住甲的手，感到对方指尖冰凉。客厅里只有雨声和偶尔的汽车驶过水洼的声响。

【进行·调整计划】沉默了几分钟，乙突然站起来，走到窗边拉开窗帘。雨势渐小，天边露出一线亮光。乙转身说，要不我们换个地方？甲疑惑地抬头。乙从口袋里掏出手机，打开地图，说城市东边有个新开的室内植物园，据说有热带雨林区，还有蝴蝶温室。甲的眼睛亮了亮，但随即又暗下去，说那不一样。乙蹲下来，平视着甲说，我知道不一样，但我们可以创造新的回忆。甲犹豫着，乙已经拨通了植物园的电话，询问预约情况。放下电话，乙笑着说，明天上午有票，还能参加手工陶艺课。甲终于露出了今天的第一个真心的笑容。

【收束·重新计划】甲和乙肩并肩坐在沙发上，手机屏幕的光映着两张脸。乙新建了一个行程表，把植物园、陶艺课和附近的书店咖啡馆排进去。甲在旁边补充，说那家书店有只店猫，特别亲人。乙笑着说那必须去撸猫。甲翻出收藏夹里那家咖啡馆的推荐帖，说他们的热可可上有手绘拉花。乙点头，说那就当是给明天的冒险加个甜头。窗外的雨渐渐停了，云层裂开一道缝，夕阳的余晖洒进来。甲靠在乙肩上，轻声说，其实只要和你一起，去哪里都行。乙笑着揉了揉甲的头发，说那当然，我们的计划永远有效。茶几上那本旅行手册被合上，放在一旁，取而代之的是新打印的植物园地图和手写的行程单。
